details.snippet: CMS-16332 Bug XhtmlString/ContentArea consumed considerably more memory than they were actually storing, and sites with large amount of content could have unnecessary memory usage.

CMS-32491 Bug Unnecessary regex creation with LinkValidationRunner. The regular expression used for validating links was created in an inefficient way and unnecessarily increased the duration of the job.
CMS-40238 Bug Fixed a potential memory leak in ContentArea where event handlers were registered but not properly unregistered. The correction ensures that event handlers are now correctly managed.
CMS-40239 Bug Fixed a potential memory leak in XhtmlString where event handlers were registered but not properly unregistered. The correction ensures that event handlers are now correctly managed.

CMS-42164 Bug Fixed an issue where missing EPiServerDataIndex attributes on SourceLink and ParentLink properties of ParentRestoreEntity resulted in slow lookups. Adding these attributes significantly improves query performance.
CMS-44859 Bug Fixed a performance bottleneck where each subscriber registration triggered a separate database query to check for notification users.
CMS-46185 Bug Fixed circular reference detection in ContentApiModelTransformer to prevent infinite recursion and memory issues.
CMS-46561 Bug Fixed an issue where the delta synchronization process repeatedly loaded referenced content within different batches, causing redundant re-indexing and reduced performance.

CMS-32491 Bug Unnecessary regex creation with LinkValidationRunner. The regular expression used for validating links was created in an inefficient way and unnecessarily increased the duration of the job.
CMS-40238 Bug Fixed a potential memory leak in ContentArea where event handlers were registered but not properly unregistered.
FIND-9812 Bug Fixed timeout issues during large content index rebuilds where the connection would drop before completion.
